definition.summary: The D5 basisfunctionaliteiten are organized around five life domains: kansrijk opgroeien, gezonde leefstijl, mentale gezondheid, vitaal ouder worden, and gezondheidsachterstanden verminderen with selfredzaamheid as a cross-cutting line.
statements: The D5 basisfunctionaliteiten are organized around five life domains: kansrijk opgroeien, gezonde leefstijl, mentale gezondheid, vitaal ouder worden, and gezondheidsachterstanden verminderen with selfredzaamheid as a cross-cutting line.

leefgebieden.note: Derived from the signed AZWA D5 definition claim.

basisfunctionaliteiten_onderbouwd.summary: Current view combines 2 compatible claims for d5.basisfunctionaliteiten_onderbouwd, led by nat_azwa_2026_cw31_kader_d5_d6: The sheet describes D5 as a way to implement proven effective basisfunctionaliteiten such as sociaal verwijzen and valpreventie on a regional scale.
statements: The sheet describes D5 as a way to implement proven effective basisfunctionaliteiten such as sociaal verwijzen and valpreventie on a regional scale.
The D5 objective is to strengthen care-social cooperation so people get equal access to the care and support they need, with sociaal verwijzen named as an example.

source_documents.title: CW 3.1 kader basisfunctionaliteiten en basisinfrastructuur D5 en D6

ontwikkelagenda_1.summary: Current view prefers this claim over earlier preserved wording. The directly underbouwde D5 set already includes examples such as sociaal verwijzen and valpreventie, while other approaches sit on ontwikkelagenda 1 or deel 2.
statements: The directly underbouwde D5 set already includes examples such as sociaal verwijzen and valpreventie, while other approaches sit on ontwikkelagenda 1 or deel 2.
ontwikkelagenda_1.coverage_note: The current top-5 claim set confirms that a development agenda exists, but it does not yet enumerate the specific ontwikkelagenda 1 items individually.

ontwikkelagenda_2.summary: Current view prefers this claim over earlier preserved wording. The directly underbouwde D5 set already includes examples such as sociaal verwijzen and valpreventie, while other approaches sit on ontwikkelagenda 1 or deel 2.
statements: The directly underbouwde D5 set already includes examples such as sociaal verwijzen and valpreventie, while other approaches sit on ontwikkelagenda 1 or deel 2.
ontwikkelagenda_2.coverage_note: The current top-5 claim set does not yet split named items between ontwikkelagenda 1 and deel 2, so this section stays intentionally incomplete.

implementation_requirements.summary: Current view prefers this claim over earlier preserved wording. Regional workagendas must specify which health goals are pursued, how basisfunctionaliteiten are used, and which interventions from the gereedschapskist are locally applied.
statements: Regional workagendas must specify which health goals are pursued, how basisfunctionaliteiten are used, and which interventions from the gereedschapskist are locally applied.

implementation_requirements.summary: Current view combines 2 compatible claims led by reg_flevoland_2023_regioplan_iza. Lower-authority claims clarify or implement the baseline rather than replacing it.
statements: The plan also explicitly calls integrale domeinoverstijgende samenwerking essential between the social domain, medical domain, long-term care, geriatrics, and wijk care.

The plan explicitly aims for better cooperation between informal care, the social domain, and the medical domain, supported by initiatives such as Voorzorgcirkels, Welzijn op Recept, and Samen Sterker in de Wijk.

implementation_requirements.summary: Current view is provisional because it rests on contextual or local evidence. The plan highlights Ecosysteem Mentale Gezondheid and Samen Sterker in de Wijk as a model for neighbourhood collaboration around psychosocial problems.
statements: The plan highlights Ecosysteem Mentale Gezondheid and Samen Sterker in de Wijk as a model for neighbourhood collaboration around psychosocial problems.

implementation_requirements.summary: Current view is provisional because it rests on contextual or local evidence. The local shift is framed as moving from care afterwards toward health first and the right help in the right place.
statements: The local shift is framed as moving from care afterwards toward health first and the right help in the right place.

definition.summary: Current view combines 2 compatible claims led by nat_azwa_2025_definitief. Lower-authority claims clarify or implement the baseline rather than replacing it.
statements: D6 requires a herkenbaar aanbod van inloopvoorzieningen sociaal en gezond, stronger local teams, supported citizen initiatives, healthy-school work, and GGD coordination.
D6 is framed as the basis in wijk and regio that must support the execution of the basisfunctionaliteiten.

source_documents.title: CW 3.1 kader basisfunctionaliteiten en basisinfrastructuur D5 en D6

governance_requirements.summary: The D6 local structure is concretized through strong local teams in hechte wijkverbanden and regional agreements about ketenaanpak governance by Q1 2026.
statements: The D6 local structure is concretized through strong local teams in hechte wijkverbanden and regional agreements about ketenaanpak governance by Q1 2026.

governance_requirements.summary: The Verbindende Coalitie, workgroups, and an expert team are used to shape the transformatieagenda and test financial feasibility.
statements: The Verbindende Coalitie, workgroups, and an expert team are used to shape the transformatieagenda and test financial feasibility.

governance_requirements.summary: A key follow-up issue for municipal implementation is clarifying roles and responsibilities between municipality, social domain, insurers, and providers.
statements: A key follow-up issue for municipal implementation is clarifying roles and responsibilities between municipality, social domain, insurers, and providers.

infrastructure_requirements.summary: Current view combines 3 compatible claims led by reg_flevoland_2023_regioplan_iza. Lower-authority claims clarify or implement the baseline rather than replacing it.
statements: The Regioplan identifies digital infrastructure as essential and names a regional collaboration organization, a shared data-availability vision, information architecture, and use-case based rollout.
The plan also makes a current shared information picture for professionals part of the local enabling structure.
The local plan names RTP Almere, the RSO, data infrastructure, and Monitoring@home as part of the operational infrastructure needed for care closer to home.

infrastructure_requirements.summary: Current view combines 5 compatible claims. The national claim set is the operative baseline, while regional or municipal claims localize implementation for Almere.
statements: Municipal implementation also carries local accountability features: funding goes to municipalities, monitoring should rely on existing data sources, and accountability should fit regular reporting to the gemeenteraad.
Municipal and care parties are expected to translate D5 into region-specific workagendas and to use the gereedschapskist for local implementation choices.
The justification also frames D6 as a required neighbourhood and regional structure for municipal implementation.
The CW 3.1 justification makes municipalities the operational channel for the D5/D6 middelen.
The Regioplan explicitly combines regional cooperation with local tailoring and says it must keep building on local needs and existing initiatives.

source_documents.title: CW 3.1 kader basisfunctionaliteiten en basisinfrastructuur D5 en D6

macro_framework.summary: Current view combines 2 compatible claims for finance.azwa_macro_framework, led by nat_azwa_2025_definitief: The financial chapter makes the budgetary agreements leading and couples AZWA to sectoral volume-growth and macro-kader arrangements through 2028.
statements: The financial chapter makes the budgetary agreements leading and couples AZWA to sectoral volume-growth and macro-kader arrangements through 2028.
The sheet presents a multi-year funding horizon for D5 and D6, covering 2026 through 2031.

source_documents.title: CW 3.1 kader basisfunctionaliteiten en basisinfrastructuur D5 en D6

funding_instrument.summary: Current view combines 2 compatible claims led by nat_azwa_2025_definitief. Lower-authority claims clarify or implement the baseline rather than replacing it.
statements: The financing form for social-domain resources is to be chosen through a dedicated process with VNG and the fund managers under the Financiele-verhoudingswet.

The policy instrument is a bestuurlijke afspraak between care and social-domain parties, with the funding instrument to be chosen through VNG, the fund managers, and VWS under the Financiele-verhoudingswet.

source_documents.title: CW 3.1 kader basisfunctionaliteiten en basisinfrastructuur D5 en D6

municipal_funding.summary: Current view prefers this claim over earlier preserved wording. For the social domain, a two-year start package for 2027-2028 is used to work out and evaluate the measures, with a route to structural funding if the evaluation and plans are positive.
statements: For the social domain, a two-year start package for 2027-2028 is used to work out and evaluate the measures, with a route to structural funding if the evaluation and plans are positive.

regional_funding_context.summary: The plan itself says the ambitions still need concrete budgets and that financing may come from SPUK GALA, SPUK IZA, and transformatiemiddelen.
statements: The plan itself says the ambitions still need concrete budgets and that financing may come from SPUK GALA, SPUK IZA, and transformatiemiddelen.

local_finance_signal.summary: Current view is provisional because it rests on contextual or local evidence. The plan does not set a detailed funding framework, but it does describe a target future balance in which care expenditures and social-domain expenditures are better aligned.
statements: The plan does not set a detailed funding framework, but it does describe a target future balance in which care expenditures and social-domain expenditures are better aligned.

national_milestones.summary: Current view prefers this claim over earlier preserved wording. The landelijk kader for D5 is to be fixed in BO IZA/AZWA in Q4 2025, with governance and further elaboration in Q1 2026.
statements: The landelijk kader for D5 is to be fixed in BO IZA/AZWA in Q4 2025, with governance and further elaboration in Q1 2026.

rollout_2030.summary: Current view prefers this claim over earlier preserved wording. The agreement aims for landelijke dekking of the known basisfunctionaliteiten by 2030, while local-team aansluiting in hechte wijkverbanden must be in place by Q4 2028.
statements: The agreement aims for landelijke dekking of the known basisfunctionaliteiten by 2030, while local-team aansluiting in hechte wijkverbanden must be in place by Q4 2028.

financing_horizon.summary: The CW 3.1 sheet gives a phased financing horizon from 2026 to 2031 for the D5/D6 package.
statements: The CW 3.1 sheet gives a phased financing horizon from 2026 to 2031 for the D5/D6 package.

source_documents.title: CW 3.1 kader basisfunctionaliteiten en basisinfrastructuur D5 en D6

regional_transformation_timing.summary: Current view combines 2 compatible claims for timeline.flevoland_transformatieagenda, led by reg_flevoland_2023_regioplan_iza: The plan expects the definite transformatieagenda by the end of the second quarter and sets up kwartiermakers for the fundamental work tracks.
statements: The plan expects the definite transformatieagenda by the end of the second quarter and sets up kwartiermakers for the fundamental work tracks.
In the first and second quarter of 2024 the workgroups are expected to move toward a concrete transformatieagenda.

almere_local_horizon.summary: The local impact horizon is stated explicitly as 2029.
statements: The local impact horizon is stated explicitly as 2029.

open_questions.question: Which specific measures belong to ontwikkelagenda 1 and which belong to deel 2 within the signed D5 framework?
Which exact municipal funding instrument was ultimately chosen in the VNG/fund-manager/VWS process for D5/D6 middelen?
How will Almere concretely satisfy the national D6 local-team and hechte-wijkverband requirement in its own governance model?
How should Almere align its local learning and dashboard work with the national 2028 update cycle and the Flevoland monitoring plan?

unresolved_conflicts.notes: Current interpretation treats the topic as layered rather than contradictory.
Current interpretation treats the topic as layered rather than contradictory.
